explanation.summary: Carbs are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in A tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in A tier with an overall score of 54 from a base nutrition score of 54. Context barely changed the result.

topPros.title: brings a clean fruit identity
topPros.explanation: It still contributes something valuable even when it is not elite.

topPros.title: hydrating whole-fruit package
topPros.explanation: Water and whole-food structure make it easier to use well than juice or sweets.

topPros.title: ingredient simplicity is hard to argue with
topPros.explanation: Whole-fruit clarity is part of the category appeal.

topCons.title: rarely eaten as a stand-alone fruit
topCons.explanation: That weakens the real-world staple argument.

topCons.title: easy to eat quickly when it is very sweet
topCons.explanation: That can blur the line between light and sugar-heavy portions.

topCons.title: protein contribution is tiny
topCons.explanation: That is normal for fruit, but it still limits nutritional breadth.

closing.summary: Lemon has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best when you want sweetness that still earns its place nutritionally.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when you want sweetness that still earns its place nutritionally.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?
